name: real_fundsageai_links_and_og
input_html:
SWP Calculator

Learn how a Systematic Withdrawal Plan works and estimate your monthly income from mutual funds. Our SWP calculator lets you model different annual withdrawal rate assumptions before you commit.

payload.title: SWP Calculator for Mutual Funds: Sustainable Withdrawals
payload.og_title: SWP Calculator for Mutual Funds India | FundSageAI
payload.og_description: Plan a sustainable monthly income from mutual funds with the SWP calculator. See how long your corpus lasts, inflation-adjusted withdrawals, and end balance. Get your results today

expected_html:
SWP Calculator

Learn how a Systematic Withdrawal Plan works and estimate your monthly income from mutual funds. Our SWP calculator lets you model different annual withdrawal rate assumptions before you commit.
notes: REAL payload — captured live from https://smart.seojuice.io/suggestions?url=https://www.fundsageai.com/calculators/swp-calculator (see platform-plugins/sdk-node/tests/fixtures/payloads/real_fundsageai.json). Only input_html is hand-authored (we only have the JSON suggestions endpoint, not the origin page HTML) to exercise the real suggestions/title/og_title/og_description/og_image fields; images/diffs/broken_link_fixes/structured_data were empty in the real payload at capture time, so this vector does not exercise those transforms.
